title: The European Night of Researchers, Women and men who do science for you
subtitle: La Noche Europea de l@s Investigador@s, Mujeres y hombres que hacen ciencia para ti
description: A practice abstract describing the participation of the SMARTPROTECT thematic network in the European Night of Researchers event held in Almería on September 24, 2021. The event, dedicated to the EU Green Deal, engaged over 500 researchers in 115 activities and showcased sustainability and pest management solutions including an electronic Trapview device and a QR code link to the project’s website.
